name: com.cidonix.unibridge
description: Local MCP tools that let AI coding agents inspect, edit, capture, and validate Unity Editor projects through a per-project bridge and relay.

_upm.changelog:
### Fixed

- BatchActions impact and rollback discovery now classify only real Assets, Packages, ProjectSettings, URI, or project-local absolute paths as filesystem paths.
- Scene hierarchy references in Target, Targets, Parent, Sibling, and nested find instructions remain scene references, including names containing angle brackets.
- ProjectPathResolver returns structured invalid-path diagnostics instead of leaking System.IO path exceptions.
- MCP regression covers dry-run impact, nested by_path references, sibling placement, executing batches, RollbackAssets, and IncludeImpact=false.

### Previous Changes

- RuntimeStateProbe sampling remains active when Time.timeScale is zero and releases its scheduler slot reliably.
- ManageGameObject Create applies and verifies private serialized ComponentProperties in Edit and Play Mode.
- Mixed ScriptApplyEdits Preview and Apply use one ordered in-memory pipeline with SHA parity.
